title: Snapshots: backups list, verify, back up now, restore

beats.caption: AC-1 - last run + snapshots list rendered
beats.expectedScreen: Snapshots view: Last backup panel shows a 'success' badge, a timestamp and a processed size; Repository panel lists 2 restic snapshots with short hex ids (56b1218f, c5b8f6b5)

beats.caption: AC-2 - verify passed, no errors found
beats.expectedScreen: Verify result panel with a 'check passed' badge and restic check output ending in 'no errors were found'

beats.caption: AC-3 - back up now: list grew to 3
beats.expectedScreen: Repository panel now lists 3 snapshots (Snapshots count reads 3) with the newly added 3rd row highlighted

beats.caption: AC-4 - restore command printed (manual by design)
beats.expectedScreen: Restore panel showing the printed command 'restic -r <repo> restore <id> --target <dir>' highlighted, with the note that restore is never automated
